hero.subtitle: 8 WCAG 2.1/2.2 AA-compliant components — ARIA, keyboard navigation, screen reader ready.

button.title: Button
button.description: 5 variants, 3 sizes, loading and disabled states — all with aria-busy, aria-disabled, and 44 px touch targets.
button.note: Disabled buttons use aria-disabled (not the HTML disabled attribute) so they remain in the tab order and are announced by screen readers.

input.title: Input / Form Field
input.description: Explicit <label>, hint text via aria-describedby, and live-region error announcements on validation failure.

password.label: Password
password.hint: Include a number and special character

input.note: Errors use role="alert" + aria-live="assertive" so screen readers interrupt and announce them immediately on blur.

errors.formHasErrors: Form has errors. Please correct the highlighted fields.
errors.fixFormErrors: Please fix the form errors before submitting.

modal.title: Modal / Dialog
modal.description: Focus trap, Escape-to-close, focus restoration on dismiss, aria-modal, aria-labelledby, aria-describedby.
modal.note: Tab / Shift+Tab cycle only within the dialog. Focus returns to the triggering button on close — WCAG 2.4.3.

table.title: Data Table
table.description: aria-sort on sortable columns, aria-selected for row selection, aria-multiselectable, live status for selection count.

tabs.title: Tabs
tabs.description: WAI-ARIA Tabs pattern — arrow keys navigate, aria-selected, role="tabpanel", disabled tabs skipped.

overview.label: Overview
overview.paragraph1: Overview panel. Press arrow keys to move between tabs. Press Tab to move focus into the panel content.
overview.paragraph2: All tab triggers use role="tab", and panels use role="tabpanel" with aria-labelledby.

wcagCriteria.label: WCAG Criteria
wcagCriteria.paragraph: Covers 2.1.1 Keyboard, 1.3.1 Info & Relationships, 4.1.2 Name/Role/Value, 2.4.7 Focus Visible.

disabled.label: Disabled
disabled.paragraph: This content is inaccessible because the tab is disabled.

tabs.note: Disabled tabs are skipped when arrowing. Only the active tab has tabindex="0"; inactive tabs use tabindex="-1".

accordion.title: Accordion
accordion.description: aria-expanded, role="region", animated panels, arrow key navigation between triggers.

wcag.title: What is WCAG?
wcag.content: The Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) are developed by the W3C and define how to make web content more accessible to people with disabilities. WCAG 2.1 and 2.2 cover the POUR principles.

keyboard.title: Keyboard accessibility
keyboard.content: All interactive elements must be operable via keyboard alone. Users should never be trapped in a component without a keyboard exit.

screenReader.title: Screen reader support
screenReader.content: Screen readers rely on semantic HTML and ARIA attributes. Every component is tested with VoiceOver (macOS/iOS) and NVDA (Windows).

contrast.title: Colour contrast requirements
contrast.content: WCAG 1.4.3 requires ≥4.5:1 contrast for normal text. All tokens in this library meet or exceed this ratio.

accordion.note: Each trigger uses aria-expanded + aria-controls. Panels use role="region" + aria-labelledby. Arrow keys move between triggers; disabled items are skipped.

dropdown.title: Dropdown Menu
dropdown.description: WAI-ARIA Menu Button pattern — role="menu", aria-haspopup, arrow key navigation, Escape-to-close.
dropdown.note: Escape closes and returns focus to the trigger. Disabled items have aria-disabled and are skipped in keyboard navigation.

toast.title: Toast / Notification
toast.description: role="status" (polite) for info/success/warning; role="alert" (assertive) for errors. Error toasts are persistent and never auto-dismiss.
toast.note: Error toasts persist until manually dismissed (WCAG 2.2.1). The close button is 44×44 px with a descriptive aria-label. Type is conveyed via icon + label — never colour alone (1.4.1).

messages.error: Something went wrong — please try again.
messages.warning: Your session will expire in 5 minutes.
messages.info: A new version of the app is available.

info.title: Accessibility Principles
info.intro: This library covers all four WCAG 2.1 POUR principles:

operable.desc: Full keyboard access, no traps, focus management

understandable.desc: Clear labels, error identification, predictable UI

robust.desc: Valid HTML, ARIA, tested with real screen readers

confirmDelete.title: Delete Record
confirmDelete.body: Are you sure you want to delete this record? This action cannot be undone.

fullscreen.title: Fullscreen Dialog
fullscreen.paragraph1: Full viewport — focus is still trapped and Escape still closes.
fullscreen.paragraph2: Useful for complex workflows or onboarding flows on mobile devices.
